enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Unakkagave Uyir Vaalgiren expresses deep love and longing, portraying the emotional struggles of a romantic relationship.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Moondru Per Moondru Kadhal, this song highlights the protagonist's feelings of love and heartache, enhancing the film's romantic narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique musical style and captivating melodies.

When was the song released?

Unakkagave Uyir Vaalgiren was released on December 2, 2012, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unakkagave Uyir Vaalgiren, the protagonist expresses a profound sense of love and yearning, encapsulating the emotional turmoil of romantic relationships. The soothing melody, combined with Yuvan's heartfelt rendition, evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This song serves as a pivotal moment in Moondru Per Moondru Kadhal, reflecting the complexities of love. Its lyrical depth and melodic beauty make it a timeless piece that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unakkagave Uyir Vaalgiren from Moondru Per Moondru Kadhal is a soul-stirring melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Yuvan's enchanting vocals and heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of romance. Dive into this captivating track that perfectly blends emotion and artistry, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: I live for you, you say you are fading away immediately.
In the opposing wind, like an umbrella, I feel you when I see you, my life.
If my body is lost, your room is my home.
Touching my heart, lightning strikes everywhere; touching my heart, your hand joins with mine.
In the mountain area, a small girl is wandering around; even in solitude, your hair should fall on me.
Your presence should never leave me.
Touching my heart, lightning strikes everywhere; touching my heart.
The first love is like a peacock's feather; this heart will grow, my love will be like a song, if I let go of your hand, it will go anywhere.
Touching my heart, lightning strikes everywhere; touching my heart.
